hooks.command: if [ ! -f CLAUDE.md ] || [ $(wc -c < CLAUDE.md) -lt 50 ]; then echo 'ONBOARDING NOT COMPLETE: This project has not been configured for Claude Code. Please tell the user to run /onboarding before starting work — it will set up CLAUDE.md, permissions, and hooks tailored to this project.'; else echo 'Project context loaded.'; cat CLAUDE.md; fi
